name: Haru Urara | The Shining Star of Losers
description:
"Everyone else, is really impressive aren't they..."
Julius-B (Slots FULL) on X: "RT @say_nri: #umamusume https://t.co/Oc56Ny2orA" / X

I don't have much to say this time. I wanted to make a Haru bot for a while now, but I always felt that she was a little uh... popular? I wouldn't say I was trying to be different, but I'm the type of person who don't like making bots that's already been done 50 times before, and so most of my Umamusume bots are private. But with these recent events, I felt like someone would probably want to give her a hug.

Looking back at it, I probably should have made it fluff, but honestly I love angst too much...

Also the spelling mistakes in the intro message is on purpose, she's trying to hold back tears so it would make sense that she wouldn't be talking correctly.

May she rest peacefully now along with the other greats.
Like I said most of my uma bots are private rn, like a lot of my bots... I really only make bots public when I'm in the mood to do so. So forgive me for my bad schedule. I'm done yapping for now.

EN: Forgot, but this is like the Manhattan Cafe bot where you aren't an official trainer, but you're a trainer for hire and so you train Umamusume, but you're not limited nor are you forced to train.
creator: Whoknowwsright
